name: crabshell
description: Codex-compatible wrappers for Crabshell memory and document workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Project memory and workflow documents for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex-friendly skills for loading, saving, and searching Crabshell memory, converting CLAUDE.md guidance to AGENTS.md, creating lightweight workflow documents, and recording investigations.
defaultPrompt: Load Crabshell memory for this project.
Save this session to Crabshell memory.
Create an investigation document for this question.
